symptoms.symptom_name: Gradual bilateral loss of speech discrimination, worse in noise, over years
symptoms.character: hears sound is present but cannot make out words; disproportionately worse in background noise

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The gradual, symmetrical, noise-worsened speech-discrimination pattern is the hallmark of presbycusis.
SSNHL is sudden and usually unilateral; a multi-year bilateral course excludes it.
High-frequency tinnitus commonly accompanies high-frequency sensorineural loss.

symptoms.symptom_name: No ear pain, no discharge, no sudden loss or blockage, no trauma

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of pain, discharge and short time-course argues against an acute infective cause.
No sudden blockage sensation, but cerumen can be asymptomatic and cannot be excluded without otoscopy.

symptoms.symptom_name: Acute agitation with belief that family are whispering to exclude him

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Age-related sensorineural hearing loss (presbycusis) with psychosocial decompensation
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Paranoid misinterpretation of muffled speech is a recognised behavioural consequence of profound hearing loss.
New behavioural change in a frail elder must be screened as possible delirium before attribution to hearing loss.

symptoms.symptom_name: Oriented, afebrile, no fluctuating attention or drowsiness (negative delirium screen)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Preserved orientation, stable alertness and absence of fever argue strongly against delirium, supporting a psychosocial rather than acute-organic cause.

symptoms.symptom_name: Social withdrawal, low mood and marital strain

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Situational low mood / social isolation secondary to hearing loss
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Untreated hearing loss is a well-established driver of social isolation and depression in older adults.

symptoms.symptom_name: Normal tympanic membranes bilaterally with intact landmarks and cone of light; no cerumen, effusion or discharge

investigation_details.expected_result: Healthy tympanic membranes bilaterally, clear canals, no wax impaction or effusion
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: A reversible cerumen impaction or otitis could be missed, or presbycusis wrongly confirmed without excluding a conductive cause.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Direct visualisation is the only way to exclude wax/effusion — unavailable in telehealth, hence sealed and requiring in-person review.

symptoms.symptom_name: Non-lateralising Weber and positive Rinne (air > bone conduction) bilaterally

investigation_details.expected_result: Weber does not lateralise; Rinne positive bilaterally — consistent with sensorineural rather than conductive loss

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: A sensorineural tuning-fork pattern distinguishes presbycusis from a conductive cause — a clinician manoeuvre unavailable via chat.

symptoms.symptom_name: High-frequency sensorineural loss on pure-tone audiogram

investigation_details.expected_result: Bilateral, symmetrical high-frequency sensorineural hearing loss with reduced speech discrimination
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: The definitive diagnosis is not confirmed and hearing-aid fitting cannot be tailored.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The audiogram is the confirmatory test — a formal audiology investigation never available in real time in telehealth.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Gradual bilateral speech-discrimination loss worse in noise + high-pitched tinnitus + sensorineural tuning-fork pattern + high-frequency audiogram dip is the classic presbycusis tetrad.

investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Excludes a reversible cerumen impaction, effusion or otitis before attributing the loss to presbycusis; cannot be done remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Formal pure-tone audiometry with speech discrimination
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: The confirmatory investigation for presbycusis and the basis for hearing-aid fitting.
Untreated hearing loss drives isolation and low mood; screen and support given the marital strain and withdrawal.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Neuroimaging / urgent bloods for the hearing loss itself
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Not indicated for a classic chronic bilateral symmetrical presbycusis picture with a negative delirium screen; would be over-investigation.
